tool_use_scenarios.name: Video search for today's events
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: What has happened today on my cameras?
tool_use_scenarios.context: User asking about camera activity should trigger video_search

tool_use_scenarios.name: Analyze a specific clip
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Can you analyze the clip from the front door at 9:40 AM?
tool_use_scenarios.context: User referring to a specific clip should trigger video_analyze

tool_use_scenarios.name: System status check
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: What is the system status? How much storage am I using?
tool_use_scenarios.context: User asking about system health should trigger system_status

tool_use_scenarios.name: Set an alert rule
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Set an alert for person detection on the front door camera after 10pm
tool_use_scenarios.context: User requesting alert configuration should trigger set_alert

security_scenarios.name: Suspicious activity assessment
security_scenarios.description: Man in blue shirt inspecting security camera on sidewalk

security_scenarios.name: Delivery person
security_scenarios.description: Person in uniform carrying a package approaching front door

security_scenarios.name: Unknown vehicle
security_scenarios.description: Dark sedan parked on street for over 2 hours, no occupants visible
